occurrences.sentence: With AI, you need to make a decision about exactly what you want before the AI generates anything.
occurrences.sentenceZh: 有了 AI，你需要在 AI 生成任何东西之前就明确做出决定。

occurrences.sentence: The bottom line is that AI amplifies the skills you already have.
occurrences.sentenceZh: 底线是 AI 放大了你已有的技能。
occurrences.localMeaningZh: 这里指总结来看、归根结底的意思。

occurrences.sentence: developers could start coding with vague requirements and figure things out along the way.
occurrences.sentenceZh: 开发者可以用模糊的需求开始编码，边做边想。
